events.text: Rhea had nothing by mouth, also known as NPO, before her procedure.[br5.443][br5.524]After the cholecystectomy, Rhea returned to her room on the surgical unit[br9.526][br9.607]in stable condition with her pain level under control.[br13.066][br13.147]Vic briefly checked the electronic health record, or EHR,[br17.16][br17.241]and saw postop orders that indicated Rhea was placed on a clear liquid diet,[br21.851][br21.932]and there was an order for her to receive 3 units of insulin subcutaneously.[br27.34][br27.421]If you were Vic, what would you do in this situation?[br30.813]
